_note: Per-org configuration for integration health notifications. Editable by admins via Runneth conversation.
_silence_hours_note: Hours to wait before sending a repeat alert for the same degraded/broken integration. Customer-configurable.
_check_interval_note: How often the health check routine runs. Changing this requires recreating the routine via Runneth.
_alert_channel_override_note: If set, integration health alerts go here instead of admin_slack_channel in permissions/config.json. Set to a Slack channel ID.
